name: Dirt Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour milk into a medium bowl and add pudding mix.
Beat until well blended, about 1-2 minutes.
2. Crush the Oreos and set aside.
3. Let the mixture stand for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in Cool Whip and half of the crushed cookies.
5. To assemble:
- Place 1 tablespoon of crushed cookies at the bottom of each cup.
- Fill cups about 3/4 full with pudding mixture.
- Top with remaining crumbs.
6. Optional garnish: place a flower in the middle and put a gummy worm halfway out of the "dirt".
